figures.caption: Fig. 1: ESNKD architecture. Environmental observations yt are encoded by the bundle encoder ψϕ to latent coordinate zt, which parameterizes the Neural ODE vector field fθ(x, u, z). A contraction layer enforces convergence during training. After training, a Koopman lifting network and an LMI solver provide an analytical ISS certificate.

Fig. 4: Left: validation RMSE (log scale) vs. training epoch on the pendulum task. Right: contraction penalty Lcon during ESNKD training, showing that the penalty reaches zero by epoch 90 and that prediction loss continues to decrease thereafter.
